verdict: empty-set under current gate → 指数転用は防御止まり / 転用Completion-B
note: Phase 1.9.2 anti-overfit loop. Single-hypothesis raw predictive power tested. Each hypothesis runs ONCE with fixed params. Holdout (last 2y) physically blocked. Not investment advice. Phase 2 (learning) not implemented.

trials.name: 288_cross
trials.rationale: 288日 ≈ 1年。長期 MA クロスは大型機関のリバランス節目 (Fama-French momentum literature が示す trend persistence の最低単位).

trials.name: 288_slope
trials.rationale: MA の傾きは trend persistence の最も単純な指標 (Hong-Stein 2007 underreaction-driven momentum 仮説).

trials.name: 288_band
trials.rationale: Bollinger Band on 1Y window. 長期 σ から逸脱は mean reversion 候補 (Lehmann 1990 mean-reversion literature).

trials.name: index_tsmom
trials.rationale: Time-series momentum, Moskowitz-Ooi-Pedersen 2012 (12 ヶ月 TSMOM、ここでは 60 日へ短縮、指数限定で確認).

trials.name: regime_tsmom
trials.rationale: Regime filter は trend in trend を捕える (Faber 2007 Tactical Asset Allocation の核アイデア).
